overall.description: A cinematic third-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, holographic advertisements, and pedestrians with glowing umbrellas. The footage appears to be from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) with high-quality ray-traced lighting and wet surface reflections.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath overpass with dynamic LED wall

events.description: dynamic LED wall shifts from cyan to magenta, reflecting on wet pavement
ego begins following pedestrian with glowing neon umbrella

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along covered sidewalk beneath concrete overpass, following a pedestrian carrying a glowing umbrella

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with illuminated umbrella walking ahead of ego in same direction
futuristic sedan driving on wet road alongside the walkway

entered.detail: large vertical wall displaying shifting neon colors that reflect off the rain-soaked pavement
massive concrete bridge overhead providing partial shelter from heavy rain
weathered concrete dividers separating pedestrian walkway from vehicle street
tall modern street light with horizontal LED fixture illuminating the walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a concrete overpass along a rain-slicked sidewalk, with a dynamic LED wall casting shifting cyan and magenta light onto the wet pavement. The camera follows a pedestrian carrying a glowing umbrella while futuristic vehicles pass by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with industrial Petrochem facility and holographic advertisements

events.description: exits covered overpass area into open street intersection with heavy rain exposure
crossing wet asphalt street as NCPD police vehicle approaches from the right
NCPD police car passes by on the right with blue emergency lighting active

agents.ego_description: exiting the covered walkway and crossing the rain-slicked intersection toward the Petrochem building, passing other pedestrians with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: NCPD police cruiser driving through intersection with flashing blue lights
pedestrian with red glowing umbrella waiting at the crosswalk edge

entered.detail: large red neon industrial sign reading 'PETROCHEM' mounted on building facade
massive rotating teal geometric hologram floating above street level
futuristic black and white police car with illuminated NCPD markings

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into the open intersection, the heavy rain becomes fully exposed. The camera crosses the wet asphalt toward the glowing Petrochem sign while an NCPD police cruiser passes by on the right, and a massive teal holographic advertisement rotates in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with massive holographic advertisements and corporate towers

events.description: approaching large rotating holographic advertisement structure in plaza center

agents.ego_description: walking through open plaza area toward towering corporate building with bright holographic displays, passing the rotating advertisement structure

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving along distant street in background

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with illuminated windows and multiple large digital billboards on facade
vertical pillars displaying rotating advertisements and corporate logos

segments.scene_description: Walking through the open plaza toward a towering corporate skyscraper covered in digital billboards. The massive teal holographic advertisement structure now passes by on the left as the camera moves deeper into the neon-lit downtown area, with heavy rain continuing to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban underpass into the expansive, rain-drenched heart of a neon-lit cyberpunk metropolis. It begins beneath a concrete overpass on a slick sidewalk, where a dynamic LED wall casts shifting cyan and magenta light across the pavement as the camera follows a pedestrian with a glowing umbrella. As the camera emerges from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a wide intersection exposed to heavy rain, crossing wet asphalt toward a glowing Petrochem sign while a police cruiser passes by. The view then expands into an open plaza, passing a massive rotating teal holographic advertisement on the left before moving deeper into the downtown area. Finally, the camera advances toward a towering corporate skyscraper draped in digital billboards under the relentless downpour.
